name: Veggieburgers
recipeIngredient: 2 cans Chick-peas, drained and mashed (10 1/2 oz each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine chick-peas, pecans, bread crumbs, spinach, carrot, green and red pepper, shallots, celery, parsley, and mayonnaise in a large bowl.
2. Shape the mixture into 6 patties.
3. Heat butter in a large skillet over medium heat.
4. Add the patties to the skillet and cook until browned on both sides, about 5-7 minutes per side.
